title: paeonia coriacea var. atlantica
intro: Paeonia coriacea var. atlantica, also known as the Atlantic peony, is a plant species belonging to the peony family and is native to the southeastern United States. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Paeonia coriacea var. atlantica include relief from menstrual cramps, anxiety, and insomnia, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms of menopause. In herbal medicine, Paeonia coriacea var. atlantica is often prepared as a root extract or tincture, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
